function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read finance lane and purchases lane rulebooks, and used exact-date then widened-window purchase lookup discipline.
function.outcome_justification: Anchor date is 2025-11-28 based on the sandbox current date, and the required widened window is 2025-11-25 through 2025-12-01. The only Domänenbüro Köln GmbH purchase record read is 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_19__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md, whose mail routing add-on line_eur is 12, but its purchased_on date 2026-01-19 falls outside the required ±3-day window. No matching in-window purchase record was found.
